sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85864" key="porfuromigh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πορφῠρο-μῐγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n85864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixed with purple,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐσθής</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.48</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
